mapper.select:
SELECT A.CUST_CD , A.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , A.CORP_TYPE FROM STOCCUST A WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND A.CUST_CD = #{CUST_CD}
SELECT * FROM TB_CO_USER WHERE CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND TO_CHAR(LSCHGDTM, 'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_CHAR((SYSDATE-3), 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY LSCHGDTM
mapper.update: UPDATE STOHCVUR SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE -- MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID = 'ARO_BATCH' -- MOD_USER_ID , COMPANY_CD = #{COMPANY_CD} -- COMPANY_CD , WORK_TYPE = #{GNAF_DSC} -- WORK_TYPE , MNG_YN = (CASE WHEN #{CORP_TYPE} = '2' THEN (CASE WHEN #{GNAF_DSC} = '1' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) ELSE (MNG_YN, '0') END) , USER_NM = #{USER_NM} -- USER_NM , DEPT_CD = #{DEPT_C} -- DEPT_CD , DEPT_NM = (SELECT DEPT_NM FROM TB_CO_DEPT WHERE CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND DEPT_C=#{DEPT_C}) -- DEPT_NM , POSITION_NM = #{PZC_NM} -- POSITION_NM , EMAIL = #{EMAIL} -- EMAIL , DUTY_NM = #{OFT_NM} -- DUTY_NM , ROLE_TEXT = #{CHRG_BSN_NM} -- ROLE_TEXT , ROLE_TEXT_DETAIL = #{DTI_CHRG_BSN_NM} -- ROLE_TEXT_DETAIL , ONES_DUTY_NM = #{CHRG_BSN_NM} -- ONES_DUTY_NM , TEL_NUM = #{DWIN_TEL} -- TEL_NUM , CELL_NUM = #{HP_NO} -- CELL_NUM WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND USER_TYPE = 'B'

INSERT INTO STOCOGDP ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , DEPT_CD , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , DEPT_NM , PARENT_DEPT_CD , ZIP_CD , ADDR1 , ADDR2 , TEL_NUM , FAX_NUM , ZONE_CD , DEPT_TYPE , DEPT_STATUS , SEQ , USE_FLAG , DEPT_CHIEF_NM , ACC_CODE , LVL , DATA_CREATE_TYPE , BRANCH_FLAG ) SELECT DISTINCT '100' AS GATE_CD , #{CUST_CD} AS BUYER_CD , A.DEPT_C AS DEPT_CD , SYSDATE AS REG_DATE , 'ARO_BATCH' AS REG_USER_ID , SYSDATE AS MOD_DATE , 'ARO_BATCH' AS MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , A.DEPT_NM AS DEPT_NM , A.UP_DEPT_C AS PARENT_DEPT_CD , A.ZIP AS ZIP_CD , A.ADDR AS ADDR1 , null AS ADDR2 , A.REP_TEL AS TEL_NUM , A.FAX AS FAX_NUM , A.PROV_C AS ZONE_CD , '100' AS DEPT_TYPE , null AS DEPT_STATUS , null AS SEQ , '1' AS USE_FLAG , null AS DEPT_CHIEF_NM , null AS ACC_CODE , '1' AS LVL , 'I' AS DATA_CREATE_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN NH_CORP_CODE = '2' THEN (CASE WHEN A.UP_DEPT_C IS NULL OR A.DEPT_C = A.UP_DEPT_C OR length(trim(UP_DEPT_C)) != 6 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) ELSE '0' END) AS BRANCH_FLAG FROM TB_CO_DEPT A WHERE CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND STSC = '1' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM STOCOGDP WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND BUYER_CD = #{CUST_CD} AND DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_C )

UPDATE STOCCUST SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE -- MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID = 'ARO_BATCH' -- MOD_USER_ID , CUST_NM = #{CORP_NM} -- CUST_NM , CUST_ENG_NM = #{CORP_NM} -- CUST_ENG_NM , CORP_TYPE = #{NH_CORP_CODE} -- CORP_TYPE , COMPANY_REG_NUM = #{CORP_ROW_NO} -- COMPANY_REG_NUM , ZIP_CD = #{ZIP} -- ZIP_CD , ADDR1 = #{ADDR} -- ADDR1 , ADDR2 = #{DTL_ADDR} -- ADDR2 , BUSINESS_TYPE = #{BIZTP} -- BUSINESS_TYPE , INDUSTRY_TYPE = #{BZC} -- INDUSTRY_TYPE , CEO_USER_NM = #{REP_NM} -- CEO_USER_NM , TEL_NUM = #{REP_TEL} -- TEL_NUM , FAX_NUM = #{FAX} -- FAX_NUM WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND CUST_CD = #{CUST_CD}

UPDATE STOCCVUR SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE -- MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID = 'ARO_BATCH' -- MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG = (CASE WHEN #{EMP_STSC} = '4' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) , COMPANY_CD = #{COMPANY_CD} -- COMPANY_CD , WORK_TYPE = #{GNAF_DSC} -- WORK_TYPE , MNG_YN = (CASE WHEN #{CORP_TYPE} = '2' THEN (CASE WHEN #{GNAF_DSC} = '1' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) ELSE (MNG_YN, '0') END) , USER_NM = #{USER_NM} -- USER_NM , DEPT_CD = #{DEPT_C} -- DEPT_CD , DEPT_NM = (SELECT DEPT_NM FROM TB_CO_DEPT WHERE CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND DEPT_C=#{DEPT_C}) -- DEPT_NM , POSITION_NM = #{PZC_NM} -- POSITION_NM , EMAIL = #{EMAIL} -- EMAIL , DUTY_NM = #{OFT_NM} -- DUTY_NM , ROLE_TEXT = #{CHRG_BSN_NM} -- ROLE_TEXT , ROLE_TEXT_DETAIL = #{DTI_CHRG_BSN_NM} -- ROLE_TEXT_DETAIL , ONES_DUTY_NM = #{CHRG_BSN_NM} -- ONES_DUTY_NM , TEL_NUM = #{DWIN_TEL} -- TEL_NUM , CELL_NUM = #{HP_NO} -- CELL_NUM WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND USER_TYPE = 'B'

INSERT INTO STOCCVUR ( GATE_CD , USER_ID , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , COMPANY_CD , MNG_YN , USER_TYPE , WORK_TYPE , USER_NM , PASSWORD , EMPLOYEE_NO , DEPT_CD , DEPT_NM , POSITION_NM , TEL_NUM , FAX_NUM , CELL_NUM , EMAIL , ZIP_CD , ADDR_1 , ADDR_2 , SMS_FLAG , MAIL_FLAG , BLOCK_FLAG , BLOCK_REASON , PW_WRONG_CNT , PW_RESET_FLAG , PW_RESET_DATE , LAST_LOGIN_DATE , IP_ADDR , USE_FLAG , PROGRESS_CD , CONFIRM_USER_ID , CONFIRM_DATE , DATA_CREATION_TYPE , ERP_IF_ID , ERP_IF_SEND_FLAG , VNGL_ROLE , AGREE_ATT_FILE_NUM , AGREE_YN , AGREE_YN_DATE , DUTY_NM , CHIEF_USER_ID , ROLE_TEXT , ROLE_TEXT_DETAIL , ONES_DUTY_NM , PARENT_DEPT_CD , PARENT_DEPT_NM , EMPLOYEE_NUM ) VALUES ( '100' -- GATE_CD , #{USER_ID} -- USER_ID , SYSDATE -- REG_DATE , 'ARO_BATCH' -- REG_USER_ID , SYSDATE -- MOD_DATE , 'ARO_BATCH' -- MOD_USER_ID , 0 -- DEL_FLAG , #{CUST_CD} -- COMPANY_CD ,(CASE WHEN #{CORP_TYPE} = '2' AND #{GNAF_DSC} = '1' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) -- 지역농축협의 "주무서무=1"인 경우 관리자로 등록 , 'B' -- USER_TYPE , #{GNAF_DSC} -- WORK_TYPE , #{USER_NM} -- USER_NM , #{PASSWORD} -- PASSWORD , null -- EMPLOYEE_NO , #{DEPT_C} -- DEPT_CD , (SELECT DEPT_NM FROM TB_CO_DEPT WHERE CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND DEPT_C=#{DEPT_C}) -- DEPT_NM , #{PZC_NM} -- POSITION_NM , #{REP_TEL} -- TEL_NUM , null -- FAX_NUM , #{HP_NO} -- CELL_NUM , #{EMAIL} -- EMAIL , null -- ZIP_CD , null -- ADDR_1 , null -- ADDR_2 , '1' -- SMS_FLAG , '1' -- MAIL_FLAG , '0' -- BLOCK_FLAG , null -- BLOCK_REASON , '0' -- PW_WRONG_CNT , '1' -- PW_RESET_FLAG , SYSDATE -- PW_RESET_DATE , null -- LAST_LOGIN_DATE , null -- IP_ADDR , '1' -- USE_FLAG , 'E' -- PROGRESS_CD , 'ARO_BATCH' -- CONFIRM_USER_ID , SYSDATE -- CONFIRM_DATE , 'E' -- DATA_CREATION_TYPE , null -- ERP_IF_ID , null -- ERP_IF_SEND_FLAG , null -- VNGL_ROLE , null -- AGREE_ATT_FILE_NUM , null -- AGREE_YN , null -- AGREE_YN_DATE , #{OFT_NM} -- DUTY_NM , null -- CHIEF_USER_ID , #{CHRG_BSN_NM} -- ROLE_TEXT , #{DTI_CHRG_BSN_NM}-- ROLE_TEXT_DETAIL , #{CHRG_BSN_NM} -- ONES_DUTY_NM , null -- PARENT_DEPT_CD , null -- PARENT_DEPT_NM , null -- EMPLOYEE_NUM )

INSERT INTO STOCUSAP ( GATE_CD , USER_ID , AUTH_CD , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , VALID_FROM_DATE , VALID_TO_DATE ) SELECT '100' AS GATE_CD , #{USER_ID} AS USER_ID , 'PF0131' AS AUTH_CD , SYSDATE AS REG_DATE , 'ARO_BATCH' AS REG_USER_ID , SYSDATE AS MOD_DATE , 'ARO_BATCH' AS MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , null AS VALID_FROM_DATE , null AS VALID_TO_DATE FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM STOCUSAP WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND USER_ID = #{USER_ID} )

INSERT INTO STOCBACP ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CTRL_CD , CTRL_USER_ID , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , USE_FLAG ) SELECT '100' AS GATE_CD , #{CUST_CD} AS BUYER_CD ,(CASE WHEN #{CORP_TYPE} = '2' AND #{GNAF_DSC} = '1' THEN 'BR100' ELSE 'BR020' END) AS CTRL_CD , #{USER_ID} AS CTRL_USER_ID , SYSDATE AS REG_DATE , 'ARO_BATCH' AS REG_USER_ID , SYSDATE AS MOD_DATE , 'ARO_BATCH' AS MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , '1' AS USE_FLAG FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM STOCBACP WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND BUYER_CD = #{CUST_CD} AND CTRL_CD = CASE WHEN #{CORP_TYPE} = '2' AND #{GNAF_DSC} = '1' THEN 'BR100' ELSE 'BR020' END AND CTRL_USER_ID = #{USER_ID} )
